summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 1 'Scuola e Community' features completed. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified - area selector, onboarding, feed, banners admin, users admin, events, placeholder pages. Role system working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Role system correctly assigns role=user to new registrations (not editor)
ADMIN_EMAILS from .env correctly determines admin role
Area selector only visible for admin/editor roles
GESTIONE nav group correctly hidden for regular users
Studio pages properly redirect role=user to /community
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing

backend: POST /api/auth/login returns correct user data with role field
GET /api/community/dashboard returns onboarded, banners, upcoming_events, recent_posts, journey_summary
POST /api/community/onboarding saves user profile (display_name, objective, level)
GET /api/community/profile returns user profile or {onboarded: false}
GET /api/community/feed returns enriched posts with author, like_count, comment_count, user_liked
POST /api/community/feed creates new post, returns enriched post
POST /api/community/feed/{post_id}/like toggles like and returns count
DELETE /api/community/feed/{post_id} soft-deletes post (author can delete own)
DELETE /api/community/feed/{post_id} admin can delete any post
GET /api/community/banners returns filtered banners for user based on audience
GET /api/community/banners/all returns all banners (admin only, 403 for regular users)
GET /api/admin/users returns all users with community_profile and post_count
frontend: Admin login and redirect to /dashboard works
Area selector (Studio/Scuola) visible for admin/editor in sidebar
Switching area changes sidebar navigation items
Community dashboard shows onboarding dialog on first visit
Onboarding dialog collects name, objective (3 options), level (dropdown)
After onboarding, dashboard shows banners (3 found), events (2 found), recent feed
Feed page allows creating posts (test post created)
Feed page shows like button and liking works
Feed page shows comments button and comment section expands
UsersAdminPage lists users (20 found) with role badges
BannersAdminPage lists banners (5 found), toggle switches visible
CommunityEventsPage shows upcoming events (2 found) from courses data
Placeholder pages show 'In arrivo' message for unimplemented features
role=user sees only Scuola e community area (no Studio selector)
role=user sidebar shows COMMUNITY nav but hides GESTIONE nav
Studio pages (/dashboard) redirect user role to /community

test_credentials.test_users_created: Multiple test_* users created during testing

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed posts, banners, and users created during testing - can be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Scuola e Community is complete and working. Community has 3 seed banners (ban_welcome, ban_ccp, ban_alumni), 2 courses with upcoming dates. Feed has TEST_ prefixed posts from testing. Admin user has completed onboarding (Interessato level). The area selector pill works correctly - admin/editor see both areas, regular users only see Scuola. GESTIONE nav group is admin/editor only.

mocked_apis.placeholder_pages: My Journey, Materials, Assistant, Inbox, Routing Rules, Email Templates, Cohorts are PLACEHOLDER pages showing 'In arrivo'
